# Bestest

> A curated used-car marketplace for Orange County, California. Bestest lists only vetted models from franchise-certified dealers — the used cars actually worth buying — and openly excludes the ones it judges not worth the risk. Founded by Jason Allan, former head of vehicle reviews and ratings at Kelley Blue Book and Autotrader.

Bestest is not an aggregator. Every model on the site clears a published curation rubric weighing reliability, resale value, and desirability; dealers must be franchise-certified. Shoppers browse curated inventory near them and reach a dealer through a concierge lead relay — no unsolicited dealer contact. Vehicle listings themselves are transient (cars sell daily) and are intentionally omitted below; the pages here are the durable, high-value ones.

## About Bestest
- [About](https://shopbestest.com/about): Who Bestest is, the founder's background, and why the site exists.
- [Methodology](https://shopbestest.com/methodology): How Bestest scores a car — the reliability, resale, and desirability rubric behind every include/exclude decision.
- [Coverage area](https://shopbestest.com/coverage-area): The Orange County cities and franchise dealers Bestest covers.

## Curated segments (the "best used" guides)
- [Compact SUVs](https://shopbestest.com/used-cars/best-used-compact-suvs): Best used compact SUVs, with model-by-model reasoning and the models Bestest rejects.
- [Midsize SUVs](https://shopbestest.com/used-cars/best-used-midsize-suvs): Best used midsize SUVs and why.
- [Subcompact SUVs](https://shopbestest.com/used-cars/best-used-subcompact-suvs): Best used subcompact SUVs.
- [Full-size SUVs](https://shopbestest.com/used-cars/best-used-full-size-suvs): Best used full-size SUVs.
- [Compact cars](https://shopbestest.com/used-cars/best-used-compact-cars): Best used compact cars.
- [Midsize cars](https://shopbestest.com/used-cars/best-used-midsize-cars): Best used midsize cars.
- [Minivans](https://shopbestest.com/used-cars/best-used-minivans): Best used minivans.
- [Midsize trucks](https://shopbestest.com/used-cars/best-used-midsize-trucks): Best used midsize / mid-size pickup trucks.
- [Full-size trucks](https://shopbestest.com/used-cars/best-used-full-size-trucks): Best used full-size pickup trucks.
- [Electric vehicles](https://shopbestest.com/used-cars/best-used-electric-vehicles): Best used EVs.
- [Luxury compact SUVs](https://shopbestest.com/used-cars/best-used-luxury-compact-suvs): Best used luxury compact SUVs.
- [Luxury midsize SUVs](https://shopbestest.com/used-cars/best-used-luxury-midsize-suvs): Best used luxury midsize SUVs.
- [Luxury full-size SUVs](https://shopbestest.com/used-cars/best-used-luxury-full-size-suvs): Best used luxury full-size SUVs.
- [Luxury subcompact SUVs](https://shopbestest.com/used-cars/best-used-luxury-subcompact-suvs): Best used luxury subcompact SUVs.
- [Luxury small cars](https://shopbestest.com/used-cars/best-used-luxury-small-cars): Best used luxury small cars.
- [Luxury midsize cars](https://shopbestest.com/used-cars/best-used-luxury-midsize-cars): Best used luxury midsize cars.
- [Luxury full-size cars](https://shopbestest.com/used-cars/best-used-luxury-full-size-cars): Best used luxury full-size cars.

- [Anaheim](https://shopbestest.com/best-used/anaheim): Best used cars in Anaheim, CA.
